title: An AI Chief of Staff
abstract: An AI Chief of Staff may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform general platforms. If productivity's yo...
abstract_zh: 嘿，别再让那些无聊的AI自己瞎搞了！“AI首席助理”来了，它不是来加班的，而是来帮你高效工作的！在瞬息万变的AI世界里，这货精准到仿佛自带GPS导航，专门挑你那些头疼的问题下手。说它 niche？没错，但它绝对是提升效率的秘密武器！
